scripts.build:fixture: cargo run --locked -p browser-delta-sandbox --features fixture-generator --bin generate-prod-fixture -- public/fixtures/prod-like
scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p browser-delta-sandbox --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --locked && wasm-bindgen ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/browser_delta_sandbox.wasm --target web --out-dir src/wasm --typescript
scripts.dev: npm run build:fixture && npm run build:wasm && vite --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.build: npm run build:fixture && npm run build:wasm && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:fixture && npm run build:wasm && playwright test
